raw_message: Hi Avik bhai, urgent - our employee had surgery yesterday at Kokilaben Hospital, cashless not approved yet. Hospital administration is demanding upfront payment of Rs 3.5 lakhs. Health ID was never issued to this employee despite our team following up multiple times. Please help urgently. This is Rajesh from Omega Pharma, we have 200 employees on Plum.

Avik ji good morning. Our group policy renewal is due next week on 26th March and we have not received the renewal quote yet. Our MD is asking me every day. If not received today we will have to look at other options. Please send today itself.
Hi, this is Priya from TechStart. Can you share the Plum app download link for our team? We just onboarded last week and employees are asking how to download the app.

Avik sir very urgent situation - our employee claim has been rejected by the insurer saying documents are missing but we have uploaded everything 3 times through the portal. The insurer representative is not responding to calls or emails. Our employee is in financial distress. This is Delta Technologies account. If this is not resolved by end of today we will be forced to escalate to our board and also post our experience on LinkedIn and HR forums.
Hi Avik, just checking if the new employee additions I sent last Friday have been processed. Sent the Excel sheet with 15 new employees. No confirmation received yet.
